mano_cua.result_summary: Email列宽设为80px后，vaadin-text-field过滤框宽度仍为192px，溢出容器112px。vaadin-grid-filter和vaadin-text-field的overflow均为true，证实过滤文本框未正确约束在列宽范围内。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: CRITICAL BUG CONFIRMED! vaadin-grid-cell-content 80x52px, vaadin-grid-filter 192x44px OVERFLOW:TRUE, vaadin-text-field 192x44px OVERFLOW:TRUE. 过滤文本框宽度192px超出80px列宽112px，不随列宽缩放。
